name: Prawn Vindaloo (Hot Prawns)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Hot red chili peppers, fresh, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the garlic, chili, cumin seed, mustard seeds, peppercorns, and turmeric together in a processor with 2 tablespoons of vinegar to act as a lubricant.
2. Heat the oil in a pan and fry the onion paste over moderately low heat until light brown.
3. Add the ground spices and continue to fry the mixture until it turns reddish, with a crumbled look.
4. Add the prawns and cook, stirring frequently for 10 minutes.
5. Add the remaining vinegar, water, and salt, and continue to simmer, uncovered, for 5 more minutes. There will be very little sauce. Serve warm.
Variation:
To prepare the prawn vindaloo as a proper pickle, follow the instructions but omit the onions and water. Cook the prawns separately in 2 tablespoons of oil before adding them to the mixture.
